title: Don't Spill's Super Duper Fantastic Fabric Client Side Mod-Pack!
description: This is a 1.20 - 1.20.1 Fabric, Modpack that is also completely client side! It also (mostly) works with Optifine dependent resource packs!
body:
This my personal Minecraft Modpack that contains features that should already be in the base game. 
>If my paper printing computer can handle it, yours can too! -Don't Spill

p.s There are many better Modpacks than mine, I just made this so I can easily share with my friends and others!

## Physics and Sounds

It contains the Sound Physics Mod, Presence Footsteps, and Simple voice chat to add to sound immersion.
You can here yourself, others, mobs echo. And blocks or mobs will be muffled behind walls. 
The Physics Mod also adds to the environment, mob body parts and blocks will make whooshing noises when falling. When landing on blocks from a high enough height it will emit 3D particles. Snowballs and eggs will be 3D too! When walking through kelp or tall grass it moves!

## Optifine... but in Fabric!

With use of the Camera Utils Mod, you can zoom with Z, like with C in normal Optifine. You can also detach your camera and edit your 3rd person camera. The Iris mod allows you to use shaders in Fabric, and with the FPS savers it should be running *mostly* smooth! It also allows the use of most Optifine dependent resource packs like [Fresh Animations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations). Continuity also makes resource packs be able to have connected textures. And ETF;EMF allows randomized mobs and entities, CIT Resewn allows custom weapons. If you have a light item will glow in your hand too!

## Smaller features

With the Visuality Mod, you'll see small details everywhere! Whenever slimes bounce around, you will see tiny slime particles. When hitting a skeleton you will see a bone pop out! Also with "Make Bubbles Pop" Mod it makes bubbles whenever TNT explodes underwater, and chest opening. The bubbles float realistically all the way to the surface and pop! Eating has an animation with, you would believe.. "Eating Animation" Mod. And you'll see your animations a bit cooler when playing in 3rd person with "Not Enough Animations"!
